task.summary: [L1-PILOT] Add retention policy header to evidence pack files
task.description: All evidence pack JSON files should start with a comment or metadata field stating the retention period (90 days) and creation date. Create a template for this.

l1_result.llm_content:
{
  "remediation_type": "doc_update",
  "file_to_edit": "docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/evidence-pack-template.json",
  "change_type": "create",
  "edit_description": "Add a comment field at the top of the JSON file to specify the retention period (90 days) and creation date for all evidence pack files.",
  "new_content": "{\n  \"metadata\": {\n    \"retention_period_days\": 90,\n    \"creation_date\": \"2024-01-01\"\n  },\n  \"evidence_packs\": []\n}\n",
  "explanation": "All evidence pack JSON files should start with a comment or metadata field stating the retention period (90 days) and creation date. The new content adds the required metadata structure to the template.",
  "final_status": "success",
  "validation_command": "python -c \"import json; f=open('docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/evidence-pack-template.json'); data=json.load(f); assert data.get('metadata') and 'retention_period_days' in data['metadata'] and 'creation_date' in data['metadata']; f.close()\""
}
